## Change Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tooling / CI

## Risk Check

- [ ] No public API response shape changed.
- [ ] No database, auth, frontend framework, or required paid API added.
- [ ] Secrets are not exposed in logs, prompts, responses, or fixtures.
- [ ] Browser-facing changes include a smoke check or a documented reason it was not feasible.
- [ ] Architecture, launch, or persistence decisions are reflected in docs/ADR when needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `.\scripts\check.ps1`
- [ ] `.\scripts\security.ps1`
- [ ] Browser smoke check, if applicable:
